entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: West African sorghum used for hybrid parental line development

entities.name: FERTILITY RESTORATION
entities.description: The ability to restore fertility in cytoplasmic male sterility systems, denoted as Rf

entities.name: A1 CYTOPLASM
entities.description: A specific cytoplasmic male sterility system in West African sorghum

entities.name: RF2
entities.description: A major fertility restorer locus located on chromosome SBI-02

entities.name: RF5
entities.description: A major fertility restorer locus located on chromosome SBI-05

entities.name: QTL MAPPING
entities.description: The process of mapping quantitative trait loci to identify genomic regions associated with fertility restoration

entities.name: GENOTYPING BY SEQUENCING
entities.description: A method used to genotype F2 populations for QTL mapping

entities.name: KASP MARKERS
entities.description: Molecular markers developed for routine use in breeding programs to identify fertility restoration

entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: The geographical region where the sorghum breeding programs are located

entities.name: SOBIC.002G057050
entities.description: A pentatricopeptide repeat gene containing a missense mutation associated with Rf2

entities.name: MISSENSE MUTATION
entities.description: A mutation in the first exon of Sobic.002G057050 that explains 81% of phenotypic variation in a F2:3 population

entities.name: PENTATRICOPEPTIDE REPEAT GENES
entities.description: A class of genes found in the Rf2 QTL region

entities.name: HYBRID PARENTAL LINES
entities.description: Lines developed for the creation of hybrid sorghum
